Roles and permissions are not included i: Roles and permissions are not included in your current plan. Existing access stays active, but custom role management is locked until you upgrade.

Roles and permissions are not included in your current plan. Existing roles stay active; upgrade your plan to change member roles.
Existing roles stay active, but your cur: Existing roles stay active, but your current plan cannot manage custom roles or permissions. Upgrade your plan to continue.
Existing team members keep access, but y: Existing team members keep access, but your current plan cannot add more. Upgrade your plan to continue.
